title: EDM v0.5 to v0.5.1 Migration Crosswalk
description: Documents enum additions from EDM v0.5.0 to v0.5.1. Additive changes based on SDK evaluation (CANDIDATE 004-010).

enum_expansions.rationale: SDK evaluation CANDIDATE: 'shame' captures self-conscious emotion distinct from sadness or guilt. Frequent in therapeutic and journaling contexts where self-evaluation is prominent.

SDK evaluation CANDIDATE 004-010: 'grandparent_grandchild' captures multi-generational bond distinct from parent_child. 'friend' as singular noun alongside 'friendship' for clarity. 'colleague' for professional peer relationships distinct from mentorship. 'couple' as alternative to romantic_partnership for broader applicability.
SDK evaluation: 'self' captures experiences anchored to self-identity, self-concept, or self-reflection rather than external entities.
SDK evaluation: 'authenticity' captures drive toward genuine self-expression and alignment with core values, distinct from autonomy (freedom) or meaning (purpose).
SDK evaluation: 'orphan' archetype captures experiences of abandonment, displacement, or searching for belonging — common in therapeutic and journaling contexts.

fields_unchanged: All field names, domain structure, and types remain identical to v0.5.0. This is an additive enum expansion only.

backward_compatibility.v05_to_v051: v0.5.0 artifacts remain valid under v0.5.1. All existing enum values are preserved.
backward_compatibility.v051_to_v05: v0.5.1 artifacts using new enum values will fail v0.5.0 strict validation. Migration would require mapping new values to closest v0.5 equivalents.

forward_compatibility.existing_artifacts: No migration required for existing v0.5.0 artifacts
forward_compatibility.new_extractions: New extractions may use expanded enum values
forward_compatibility.validation: v0.5.1 validators will accept all v0.5.0 values plus new expanded values

steps: 2. Update validators to accept expanded enum values
3. No field migration required - additive changes only
